content: I've been working as an AI ethics researcher for 10 years, but I'm feeling a bit stuck in my career. I'm thinking of making a change.
That's understandable, Devon. It's normal to feel stuck sometimes. What are your thoughts on what you'd like to do next?
I'm not sure yet. I've been dealing with chronic back pain and it's making it hard for me to focus on my work. I'm thinking of taking a break to focus on my health.
That's a good idea. Your health should always be your top priority. Have you thought about what you'll do during your break?
I'd like to focus on my urban sketching hobby. I've been wanting to start a sketchbook for a while now.
That sounds like a great idea. Urban sketching can be very therapeutic. Do you have a favorite place to sketch?
I love sketching in coffee shops. There's something about the atmosphere that inspires me.
That's great. Coffee shops can be very stimulating. Have you thought about how you'll balance your sketching hobby with your marathon running training?
I'm not sure yet. I'll have to figure it out as I go. I'm just taking things one day at a time.
That's a good approach. It's always better to take things one step at a time. Do you have any other hobbies or interests that you're passionate about?
I'm also interested in hiking. I've been trying to get out on the trails at least once a week.
